entities.name: MARUCA TESTULALIS
entities.description: A damaging insect pest of pigeonpea that webs leaves and terminal buds and feeds and pupates inside the web.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop attacked by Maruca testulalis in Asia and Africa.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where Maruca testulalis is a damaging pest.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where Maruca testulalis is a damaging pest.

entities.name: LIGHT TRAPS
entities.description: A tool used for monitoring adult populations of Maruca testulalis.

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: A location in India where monitoring of Maruca testulalis was conducted.

entities.name: HISARIN
entities.description: A location in India where monitoring of Maruca testulalis was conducted.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the monitoring sites Patancheru and Hisarin are located.

entities.name: PODDING STAGE
entities.description: The growth stage of the crop until which attacks by Maruca testulalis can last.
